column1: JEOPARDY DAILY GAME - CSV FORMAT GUIDE
1. Make a copy of this file
2. Rename the copy to the game date: YYYY-MM-DD.csv (e.g. 2026-09-05.csv)
3. Fill in your categories and clues below
4. Save as CSV (comma-separated) and upload to the /daily/ folder on your server
5. Commas inside clues are fine — just wrap the cell in quotes (Excel does this automatically)
